stemHtml: What is the speed that corresponds to the minimum point on the thrust required vs. IAS graph, and what is this speed used for in turbojet aeroplanes?

options.a: Best EAS/Drag ratio, used to minimise fuel flow.
options.b: Best range, used to maximise aircraft range.
options.c: Best endurance, used to airborne maximise range (NAM).
options.d: Best endurance, used to maximise airborne time.
